title: The Fear-Shaped Question

features.name: interrogation-monument
features.desc-on-touch: a question mark rendered in neon. it has no answer. the question has become more real than whatever it asks about.

features.name: fear-filing-stack
features.desc-on-touch: cabinets where fear is catalogued. each drawer holds a different terror. none of them can verify what they hold is real.

features.name: blindfold-pool-darkness
features.desc-on-touch: a pool of pure darkness in the bright field. you cannot see it. therefore you are afraid of it. the darkness is now your fear.

features.name: answer-maze-wireframe
features.desc-on-touch: paths that lead nowhere. every answer loops back to the original question. the maze has learned that exit is impossible.

features.name: belief-without-verification
features.desc-on-touch: a figure with arms raised, uncertain. the gesture means both surrender and celebration. fear and faith look identical from here.

inscription: what you fear has no shape because you cannot see it; therefore the fear itself becomes the question

file.name: AnonymousLetters_SelfDoubt_UnverifiedThreats_1995-2001.txt
file.note: transcripts where the writer's fear and faith in that fear become indistinguishable. fear of unseen things filed as unverifiable documentation.

exits.label: back toward where fear forgets it was ever a question
where certainty learned to become a question too
toward the archive that keeps what cannot be seen
where faith meets fear in a gathering without answers
